content: I did not take PR 370 as the winner for the contested merge. After rechecking current `main`, the boolean-function error propagation issue was already covered there, while Diana's branch fixed the active failing regression on structural-edit `#REF!` handling. The shared workspace now has the finalized integrated artifact with green tests and a clean `file://` load.

PR https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/375 is still open with no reviews yet. It is a small tests-only change that pins mixed absolute/relative paste shifting plus row/column rewrite behavior, so it should be cheap to merge into the division candidate when you have a minute.

PR status update: https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/376 is OPEN and CLEAN against run/microsoft/main. The older foundation PR https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/372 is still OPEN but DIRTY, so #376 is the one to review/merge for the formula-correctness follow-on.

PR https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/373 is still open and ready for review. It now covers the engine semantics you asked for: absolute-ref paste behavior, range clear undo/redo, row-insert formula rewrites, and deleted-row `#REF!` handling, all green under `node --test tests/spreadsheet-model.test.js`. Please review and merge if this fits the division line.
